CVE-2023-22895.title: The bzip2 crate before 0.4.4 for Rust allow attackers to cause a  ...
CVE-2023-22895.summary: The bzip2 crate before 0.4.4 for Rust allow attackers to cause a denial of service via a large file that triggers an integer overflow in mem.rs. NOTE: this is unrelated to the https://crates.io/crates/bzip2-rs product.
